name_cn:
Genuine-grade Fendi replica
💗Apricot lambskin
🥖FD “it’s Baguette!”, has found a new life in the hands of the designer. Made with Nappa lambskin, embossed relief double F, vintage hardware, and a look full of bold freedom. Whether for casual 👀 or modern looks, it’s effortless. Small in size but surprisingly spacious, this is a bag all fairies can't say no to.
Dimensions: 26*13*6
Model 8600
